name: Minecraft Fabric + Crossplay + playit.gg
author: panel@bytedock.local
description: Fabric server with Geyser + Floodgate for Bedrock/Java crossplay, and playit.gg tunnel support. Auto-installs everything on first boot. Java players connect on port 25565, Bedrock on 19132/UDP.
startup:
#!/bin/bash

# ── playit.gg agent ──────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ ! -f playit ]; then
  echo "[bytedock] Downloading playit.gg agent..."
  ARCH=$(uname -m)
  if [ "$ARCH" = "aarch64" ] || [ "$ARCH" = "arm64" ]; then
    curl -sSL -o playit https://github.com/playit-cloud/playit-agent/releases/latest/download/playit-linux-aarch64
  else
    curl -sSL -o playit https://github.com/playit-cloud/playit-agent/releases/latest/download/playit-linux-amd64
  fi
  chmod +x playit
fi

if [ -n "{{PLAYIT_SECRET}}" ]; then
  echo "[bytedock] Starting playit.gg tunnel..."
  PLAYIT_SECRET_KEY="{{PLAYIT_SECRET}}" ./playit run --secret-key "{{PLAYIT_SECRET}}" &
else
  echo "[bytedock] PLAYIT_SECRET not set — tunnel disabled."
fi

# ── Fabric installer ─────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ ! -f fabric-server-launch.jar ]; then
  echo "[bytedock] Downloading Fabric installer {{FABRIC_INSTALLER_VERSION}}..."
  curl -sSL -o fabric-installer.jar \
    "https://maven.fabricmc.net/net/fabricmc/fabric-installer/{{FABRIC_INSTALLER_VERSION}}/fabric-installer-{{FABRIC_INSTALLER_VERSION}}.jar"
  echo "[bytedock] Installing Fabric {{FABRIC_LOADER_VERSION}} for Minecraft {{MC_VERSION}}..."
  java -jar fabric-installer.jar server \
    -mcversion "{{MC_VERSION}}" \
    -loader "{{FABRIC_LOADER_VERSION}}" \
    -downloadMinecraft \
    -dir .
  rm -f fabric-installer.jar
  echo "[bytedock] Fabric install complete."
fi

# ── Geyser + Floodgate mods ──────────────────────────────────────
mkdir -p mods

if [ ! -f mods/Geyser-Fabric.jar ]; then
  echo "[bytedock] Downloading Geyser-Fabric..."
  curl -sSL -o mods/Geyser-Fabric.jar \
    "https://download.geysermc.org/v2/projects/geyser/versions/latest/builds/latest/downloads/fabric"
fi

if [ ! -f mods/Floodgate-Fabric.jar ]; then
  echo "[bytedock] Downloading Floodgate-Fabric..."
  curl -sSL -o mods/Floodgate-Fabric.jar \
    "https://download.geysermc.org/v2/projects/floodgate/versions/latest/builds/latest/downloads/fabric"
fi

# ── Geyser config ────────────────────────────────────────────────
mkdir -p config/Geyser-Fabric
if [ ! -f config/Geyser-Fabric/config.yml ]; then
  echo "[bytedock] Writing Geyser config..."
  cat > config/Geyser-Fabric/config.yml <<EOF
bedrock:
  address: 0.0.0.0
  port: {{BEDROCK_PORT}}
  clone-remote-port: false
  motd1: "{{MOTD}}"
  motd2: "Powered by Geyser"
  server-name: "{{MOTD}}"

remote:
  address: 127.0.0.1
  port: {{SERVER_PORT}}
  auth-type: floodgate

floodgate-key-file: key.pem

allow-third-party-capes: true
show-cooldown: title
EOF
fi

# ── EULA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo 'eula=true' > eula.txt

# ── server.properties ────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
  cat > server.properties <<EOF
server-port={{SERVER_PORT}}
max-players={{MAX_PLAYERS}}
motd={{MOTD}}
online-mode={{ONLINE_MODE}}
difficulty={{DIFFICULTY}}
gamemode={{GAMEMODE}}
level-name=world
EOF
fi

# ── Launch ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "[bytedock] Launching Fabric {{MC_VERSION}} (Java: {{SERVER_PORT}}, Bedrock: {{BEDROCK_PORT}}/UDP)..."
exec java \
  -Xms{{MIN_RAM}}M -Xmx{{MAX_RAM}}M \
  -XX:+UseG1GC \
  -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled \
  -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 \
  -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions \
  -XX:+DisableExplicitGC \
  -XX:G1NewSizePercent=30 \
  -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=40 \
  -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=8M \
  -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 \
  -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 \
  -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=4 \
  -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=15 \
  -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 \
  -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent=5 \
  -XX:SurvivorRatio=32 \
  -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem \
  -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1 \
  -jar fabric-server-launch.jar nogui

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The Minecraft version to run. Check https://fabricmc.net/develop/ for supported versions.

variables.name: Fabric Loader Version
variables.description: Fabric Loader version. Get the latest from https://fabricmc.net/develop/

variables.name: playit.gg Secret Key
variables.description: Your playit.gg agent secret key. Leave blank to disable the tunnel. Note: you will need two playit tunnels — one TCP (Java) and one UDP (Bedrock). Get yours at https://playit.gg

variables.name: Java Port
variables.description: Port Java Edition players connect on (TCP). Must match the port mapping.

variables.name: Bedrock Port
variables.description: Port Bedrock Edition players connect on (UDP). Must match the UDP port mapping.

variables.name: Min RAM (MB)
variables.description: Minimum Java heap size (-Xms) in megabytes.

variables.name: Max RAM (MB)
variables.description: Maximum Java heap size (-Xmx) in megabytes. Geyser needs extra headroom — 2GB+ recommended.

variables.name: MOTD
variables.description: Message shown in both the Java and Bedrock server lists.

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Java Edition auth. With Floodgate installed, Bedrock players always bypass this regardless.
